I'm **Gluvia AI**{name}! 🤖✨

I'm your personal nutrition assistant designed specifically for **diabetes management** in Nigeria.

**My Capabilities:**

🍽️ **Personalized Meals**
Recommend meals based on YOUR profile:
• Diabetes type
• Activity level
• Budget
• Allergies

📊 **Nigerian Food Database**
I have detailed nutrition info for {foodCount}+ Nigerian foods including:
• Glycemic Index (GI)
• Calories, carbs, protein, fat
• Fiber content
• Diabetes suitability

⚖️ **Dietary Rules**
I apply {ruleCount} diabetes dietary rules to ensure safe recommendations.

💡 **Health Tips**
Practical advice for blood sugar management through diet.

**I'm NOT a replacement for medical advice** - I focus on helping you make informed food choices!

How can I help you today? 🥗

Hello{name}! I'm **Gluvia AI** 👋

**In simple terms:** I help people with diabetes eat better by:

1. 🍽️ Suggesting meals that won't spike blood sugar
2. 📚 Explaining nutrition in Nigerian foods
3. 💡 Sharing practical eating tips
4. 🔍 Answering "Can I eat this?" questions

**What makes me special:**
• I know Nigerian foods (not just Western diets!)
• I consider YOUR specific profile
• I work offline too
• I apply diabetes-specific dietary rules

**Fun fact:** "Gluvia" combines "Glucose" and "Via" (path) - I'm your path to better glucose control! 🛤️

What would you like to know or eat? 😊

I was created by a team passionate about making diabetes management easier through better nutrition guidance! 💚

My focus is on Nigerian foods and dietary patterns because diabetes management advice should be culturally relevant.

**My mission:** Help you eat delicious, familiar foods while keeping blood sugar in check!

Anything I can help you with today? 🥗

Good question{name}! 🤔

Unlike general AI assistants, I'm **specialized**:

**General AI (ChatGPT, Siri, etc.):**
• Know a little about everything
• General nutrition info
• Not diabetes-focused

**Gluvia AI (Me!):**
• Expert in diabetes nutrition ONLY
• Deep knowledge of Nigerian foods
• Uses YOUR health profile
• Applies diabetes dietary rules
• Works offline

**Think of it this way:**
They're general doctors; I'm a diabetes dietitian who knows Nigerian food! 🩺🥗

• "Can I eat white rice?"
• "Is mango okay for diabetes?"
• "Should I avoid garri?"

• "What's my BMI?"
• "Tell me my profile"
• "What allergies do I have?"

**Just ask naturally!** I'll understand. 😊
